entry.title: Jumbo Shrimp Returns to Del Taco
entry.summary:
Jumbo Shrimp has made its way back onto the Del Taco menu for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season.
Available now for a limited time through April 14, 2026, the fast-food chain is serving up Jumbo Shrimp Tacos and Jumbo Shrimp Burritos. Jumbo Shrimp Tacos are being offered at 2 for $6. Each one features crispy-fried Jumbo Shrimp, house-made pico de gallo, cabbage, and secret sauce, folded in a warm flour tortilla and served with a lime wedge. The Jumbo Shrimp Burrito features Jumbo Shrimp, cilantro-lime rice, pico de gallo, cabbage, and secret sauce, wrapped up in a flour tortilla. Del Taco is also offering a limited-time deal on its Beer Battered Fish Tacos, where you can get 3 for $7. The fish taco features a beer-battered and fried wild-caught Alaska Pollock filet, shredded cabbage, secret sauce, and pico de gallo, folded in a warm corn tortilla, and served with a lime wedge. Photo via Del Taco. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Carl's Jr. Offers Buy-One-Get-One-for-$1 Deal on Famous Star Burger
entry.summary:
Carl's Jr. is offering a limited-time deal where you can get a Famous Star burger for $1 when you buy one at regular price at participating locations chain-wide.
The Famous Star is one of Carl's Jr.'s signature burgers (along with the Western Bacon Cheeseburger). It features a charbroiled beef patty, melted American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, dill pickles, Special Sauce, and mayo, on a toasted sesame seed bun. Prices vary, but a single-patty Famous Star (the promotion is only good on the single-patty version) costs $7.49 at my local Carl's Jr. in Los Angeles. Photo via Carl's Jr. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Little Caesars - Detroit-Style Slices-N-Stix
entry.summary:
Little Caesars' new Detroit-Style Slices-N-Stix features two slices of Detroit-Style Deep Dish Pepperoni pizza, four pieces of Italian Cheese Bread, and Crazy Sauce for dipping.
It's $4.99 in most areas, but it cost me $5.99 here in Los Angeles.
This is basically the Detroit-Style version of Little Caesars' regular Slices-N-Stix. It's the same size as half of the chain's Detroit-Style Pizza. I prefer this over the regular Slices-N-Stix, as, even though the crust is thicker, there's more cheese and texture to it. There's a nice contrast between the crispy edges and soft crumb. Mine was underbaked, though; it was soft and pale along the bottom rather than crisp.
The size makes for a hearty meal (or two light meals) with a nice variety between the cheese sticks and pizza. There's not a lot of pepperoni, but the flavor was there. I prefer ranch for dipping the cheese sticks, as the Crazy Sauce makes them taste more like pizza. They give a generous amount of Crazy Sauce, though. There's a fresh tang and light seasoned flavor to it.
Overall, Little Caesars' Detroit-Style Slices-N-Stix hit the spot for a nice lunch. I'm a fan of Little Caesars' Detroit-Style Pizza and its Italian Cheese Bread, so getting the two in one affordable meal with little in the way of leftovers is a no-brainer for me. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wingstop Offers New $9 Loaded Flavor Boxes
entry.summary:
Wingstop introduces new $9 Loaded Flavor Boxes as a limited-time meal deal.
Each Loaded Flavor Box features six wings (your choice of boneless or classic) or three tenders and fries, tossed in one of four flavors and topped with a drizzle of Housemade Ranch. Flavor options include Lemon Pepper, OG Hot, Garlic Parm, and Hot Honey Rub. If you're comparing prices, a 3-piece Crispy Tender Combo (three tenders, regular fries or veggies sticks, one dip, and a 20-oz drink) costs $9.99 in Los Angeles, while a 6-piece Wing Combo (six boneless or classic wings, regular fries or veggies sticks, one dip, and a 20-oz drink) costs $13.59 (with boneless wings) to $14.59 (with classic wings). Photo via Wingstop. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Dutch Bros' Serves Up 2026 Valentine's Day Menu
entry.summary:
Dutch Bros serves up two new flavors, the Pink Velvet Mocha and Luvstruck Rebel, for its 2026 Valentine's Day menu.
The Pink Velvet Mocha features a pink velvet-inspired flavor topped with a pink velvet frosting Soft Top. You can get it as an iced mocha, shake, freeze, or cold brew. The Luvstruck Rebel features blackberry and vanilla flavors mixed with the chain's Rebel energy drink, topped with pink velvet frosting Soft Top. You can also get it as a shake or lemonade. Both Valentine's Day drinks are now available at all Dutch Bros locations, while supplies last. Photo via Dutch Bros Coffee. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Fatburger Introduces New Flatburger
entry.summary:
Fatburger introduces a new smashburger, the Flatburger, for a limited time now through June 30, 2026, at participating locations.
The Flatburger features two lean beef patties smashed on the grill, served with American cheese, grilled onions, pickles, and Fatburger sauce (a tangy, creamy sauce) on a toasted bun You may wonder why the chain is not calling the new burger the Skinnyburger; that's because the chain already has a Skinnyburger, which is a burger with beef patties as the bun. Prices vary, but the Flatburger goes for $8.99 (versus $8.75 for an Original Fatburger) at a location near me in Los Angeles. Photo via Fatburger. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New Korean BBQ-Style Red Baron Pizza Lands in Stores
entry.summary:
Frozen pizza brand Red Baron partners with Korean food brand Bibigo to launch new Red Baron x Bibigo Korean BBQ-Style Classic Crust Pizza this month as a limited-edition variety exclusive to Kroger stores.
The new pizza features a Korean BBQ‑style sauce, mozzarella, cheddar, marinated beef, carrots, caramelized onions, and green onions on Red Baron's Classic pizza crust. It weighs in at 21.95 ounces. Both Red Baron and Bibigo are a part of CJ Schwan's, which also makes Freschetta Pizza, Tony's Frozen Pizza, Mrs. Smith's Pies, Edwards Frozen Pies, and Pagoda Egg Rolls. Photo via CJ Schwan's. This year's Valentine's Day menu includes: - Heart Eyes Daydream Refresher - A Strawberry Dragonfruit Refresher with blueberry flavor and oatmilk, topped with Sweet Cold Foam. - Chocolate Covered Strawberry Daydream Refresher - A Strawberry Dragonfruit Refresher with oatmilk, topped with Chocolate Cold Foam. - Blush Spritz Refresher - A Strawberry Dragonfruit Refresher topped with sparkling water. - Toxic Ex-Presso Cloud Latte - Espresso mixed with a mocha swirl and raspberry flavor, topped with Chocolate Cold Foam. - Sweet On You Cloud Latte - Espresso mixed with whole milk, a caramel swirl, and coconut flavor, topped with Sweet Cold Foam. - The Perfect Matcha - Matcha green tea mixed with whole milk and topped with Sweet Cold Foam. - Buff Chai - Chai syrup combined with Protein Milk. The drink is available hot or iced. - Brownie Batter Classic Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with chocolaty, brownie-batter-flavored buttercreme and finished with chocolate icing and sprinkles. - Cupid’s Choice Classic Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Bavarian Kreme, topped with strawberry-flavored icing and festive sprinkles. - Valentine's Filled Donuts - Seasonal heart-shaped versions of regular filled donuts. - Valentine's Sprinkle Donuts and Munchkins - Regular sprinkled donuts and Munchkins donuts holes come with pink, red, and white sprinkles for Valentine's Day. - Giftable Valentine’s Day Munchkins Tin - A limited-edition tin containing an assortment of 25 Munchkins donut holes. The tin's come in three collectible designs featuring phrases, including: Sweet On U, Just Bcuz, and Ur A Treat. Photo via Dunkin'. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Sonic Launches New Reese's Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake
entry.summary:
Sonic launches the new Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake Made with Reese's as a limited-time flavor. The fast-food chain also brings back its Fish Sandwich for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season.
The Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake Made with Reese's features vanilla soft serve blended with chocolate syrup, peanut butter syrup, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, topped with whipped topping and a maraschino cherry. Sonic's Fish Sandwich features wild-caught Alaska pollock filet served with tartar sauce and shredded lettuce on a toasted bun. Prices vary, but a location near me in Los Angeles charges $6.59 for the shake in a medium size and $4.99 for the Fish Sandwich. Photo via Sonic. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Starbucks Welcomes 2026 Valentine's Day Drinks
entry.summary:
Starbucks debuts two new Valentine's Day beverages for a limited time alongside two new permanent matcha beverages.
The Valentine's Day drinks include: - White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Brew - Inspired by chocolate-covered strawberries, the drink features cold brew coffee and vanilla-flavored syrup, topped with White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Foam and chocolate curls. While it's available, the White Chocolate Strawberry Cream Cold Foam can be added to any cold beverage. - Strawberry Shortcake Frappuccino - A Creme Frappuccino swirled with strawberry puree and cinnamon dolce syrup, topped with whipped cream and a caramel-sugar sprinkle. While the Valentine's Day beverages are here for a limited time only, the two new matcha drinks are available year-round and include: - Iced Double Berry Matcha - Layers of strawberry puree, matcha, and Raspberry Cream Cold Foam served over ice. Raspberry Cream Cold Foam can be added to any cold beverage year-round, and the raspberry syrup used to make it is also a permanent customization option. - Iced Banana Bread Matcha - Matcha, brown sugar syrup, milk, and ice, topped with Banana Cream Cold Foam and a caramel crunch topping. Photo via Starbucks. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Sea Dog and Fish 'n Chips Return to Wienerschnitzel
entry.summary:
The Sea Dog and Fish 'n Chips are back at Wienerschnitzel in time for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season.
The Sea Dog (pictured) is like a hot dog but with a fish filet instead of a frankfurter. Specifically, it features a battered and fried fish filet nestled in a steamed hot dog bun with American cheese and tartar sauce. Prices vary, but it costs $4.99 at my local Wienerschnitzel in Los Angeles. Wienerschnitzel's Fish 'n Chips features two or four battered and deep-fried fish filets accompanied by French fries and tartar sauce. A two-piece order costs $6.59 near me, while a four-piece order costs $11.99. Both seasonal Lent-friendly items are now available for a limited time. Photo via Wienerschnitzel. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Jimmy John's Launches New Meal Diamond Meal
entry.summary:
Jimmy John's has partnered with Hellmann's to launch the new Meal Diamond Deal for a limited time at participating locations nationwide through February 22, 2026.
The Meal Diamond Deal features a Ham & Three Cheese Melt, chips, and a regular fountain drink for a price that varies by location. A Meal Diamond Meal with a regular-sized sub costs $12.69 near me in Los Angeles (it's $21.99 with a Giant sub). A Ham & Three Cheese Melt is a sub featuring double ham, cheddar, parmesan, and provolone, served on toasted French bread. It normally costs $11.69 near me, which means the deal nets you chips and a drink for $1. That's the same as a "make a sandwich a combo for $1" deal that Jimmy John's has been offering since last month (prices may vary by location). The name of the meal requires some explanation: During this year's Super Bowl, Hellmann's will be airing a commercial starring comedian Andy Samberg as "Meal Diamond," a riff on musical artist Neil Diamond, singing "Sweet Sandwich Time," a parody of Neil Diamond's hit song, "Sweet Caroline." You can view the longform version of the ad below (a shortened 30-second spot will air during the game):
Photo via Jimmy John's. Read more at Brand Eating!

Available starting February 18, 2026:
Priano Bronze Cut Orzo or Stars - $1.99 Reganno Ditalini - $1.49 Emporium Selection Irish Cheese Truckle Assortment - $3.99 Bremer Onion Pierogies - $9.99 Season's Choice Cheesy Potato Tots - $4.29 Bremer Philly Cheesesteak or Ham & Swiss Sandwich - $7.99
Available starting February 25, 2026:

entry.id: How Safe Is It To Reuse Those Plastic Takeout Containers You’ve Been Saving?
entry.summary: Before you reheat tonight’s leftovers, it helps to know what actually matters when it comes to plastic food containers, especially as questions about microplastics continue to grow.
